m5cores3_ltr_init.message0: Initialize onboard distance and ambient light sensors
m5cores3_ltr_init.tooltip: Initialize LTR-553ALS-WA using official default parameters and enable distance and ambient light measurements

m5cores3_ltr_available.message0: Onboard distance and ambient light sensors available

m5cores3_ltr_value.tooltip: Read the proximity or ambient light raw values of the LTR-553ALS-WA

m5cores3_camera_init.tooltip: Initialize GC0308 according to the official fixed pins, the camera format is RGB565 and the resolution is QVGA

m5cores3_camera_capture_display.message0: Onboard camera takes pictures and displays
m5cores3_camera_capture_display.tooltip: Get a frame of RGB565 QVGA image and draw it to the upper left corner of the screen, return whether it is successful
